visual_description:
The audio opens with a slow, melancholic instrumental piece, creating a somber and contemplative mood. A close-up shot focuses on a man with dark hair, wearing a white collared shirt. He is putting on a pair of black over-ear headphones, his expression somber and focused. In the blurred background, another person is visible, also wearing headphones and looking down. The setting is dimly lit, suggesting an indoor, nighttime environment. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and the action of him adjusting his headphones. The music is gentle and atmospheric, evoking a sense of quiet introspection or melancholy.

The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man in a patterned blue shirt opening a dark wooden door. The door is set in a weathered, tiled wall. As the door opens, another man, dressed in a black leather jacket and a black shirt, steps into the frame, looking forward with a serious expression. A third person is partially visible behind him. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera is static, capturing the moment the man enters the room. The lighting
